title: HighProteinFetaBeanDip
description: A savory Greek-inspired dish featuring high-protein-friendly feta cheese and beans for a quick weeknight snack or appetizer.

ingredients.name: can of drained and rinsed black beans

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine crumbled feta cheese with drained and rinsed black beans, diced red bell pepper, finely chopped red onion, olive oil, minced garlic, lemon juice, dijon mustard, cayenne pepper (if using), and smoked paprika (if using).
Mix all ingredients until well combined. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Transfer the mixture into a serving bowl or small ramekins lined with baking paper.
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, until golden brown on top.
Remove from oven, let cool slightly, then serve cold.
